faq.headline: We answer your questions before getting started
faq.lead: If you need a custom solution, we adapt team, scope and roadmap to your context.

q1.title: What kind of projects do you take?
q1.desc: From landing pages and MVPs to digital operations optimization and cloud.

q2.title: Do you work with internal teams?
q2.desc: Yes. We integrate with your team to accelerate without friction or overload.

q3.title: How do you measure progress?
q3.desc: We define KPIs and deliverables per sprint with full visibility into project status.

q4.title: How long does it take to start?
q4.desc: We can begin discovery in less than 5 business days after initial alignment.

contact.headline: Turn your goals into an actionable roadmap
contact.lead: We respond in less than 24 business hours with an initial proposal.

trust.lead: We reply within 24h with a clear plan — no commitment required, no fine print.
trust.point3: No long-term lock-in · stop whenever you want

faq.headline: Frequently asked questions
faq.lead: Everything you need to know before taking the first step.

q1.title: What are the payment options?
q1.desc: We work with milestone-based payments. Typically split into an upfront payment at kick-off and partial payments upon completing each phase. We accept bank transfers and other methods depending on the client's country.

q2.title: How long does a project take?
q2.desc: It depends on scope. A landing page can be ready in 1–2 weeks. A full web product may take between 4 and 12 weeks. During discovery we deliver a detailed timeline broken down by phase.

q3.title: What if I need to add more content or products later?
q3.desc: We offer maintenance and expansion plans. You can contract additional hours or a continuous update package. The cost varies depending on volume and frequency of changes.

q4.title: What does the project warranty cover?
q4.desc: It covers functional bug fixes and minor adjustments for 30 days after delivery, at no extra cost. It does not cover new features or scope changes beyond what was agreed.

q5.title: Will my site have long-term maintenance?
q5.desc: Yes. We offer monthly maintenance plans that include security updates, uptime monitoring, regular backups and priority technical support to keep your site running at all times.
